M

marks - Variable in class Marks
 
Marks - Class in <Unnamed>
Class Marks, which stores student's marks as Map (Subject name, Mark).

R

RecordBook - Class in <Unnamed>
Class record book which stores information about student: Student's name, diploma work mark and semester grades as Map (semester number, Marks).

redDiplomaCheck() - Method in class RecordBook
Count the ability of getting red diploma.

S
